description:
## The change

Add the new variants and route lowering through them, but keep the
runtime bit pattern unchanged. After this commit, `[]` and `nil` are
distinct at the IR level but produce identical runtime values.

### Add

  - `Const::EmptyList` in `src/fz_ir.rs`.
  - `Prim::IsEmptyList` in `src/fz_ir.rs` — RENAMED from `Prim::ListIsNil`.
    (No caller anywhere meant "is this the nil atom value." Every
    consumer wanted "is this the empty list / end-of-list sentinel."
    The rename corrects a misleading name.)
  - `pattern_matrix::SwitchKey::EmptyList` distinct from
    `pattern_matrix::SwitchKey::Nil`.

### Route

  - `Pattern::List(vec![], None)` (the `[]` literal pattern) lowers to
    a check via `Prim::IsEmptyList` and routes to `SwitchKey::EmptyList`
    in both matrix implementations (`src/ir_lower.rs` and
    `src/pattern_matrix.rs`).
  - `Pattern::Nil` (the `nil` keyword pattern) keeps routing to
    `Prim::Const(Const::Nil)` + `emit_eq_check`, and to
    `SwitchKey::Nil`.
  - `Expr::List(vec![], None)` / `Prim::MakeList(vec![], None)` produce
    `Const::EmptyList` semantics.

### Codegen (stays on NIL_BITS for this ticket)

  - `Const::EmptyList` emits the SAME bits as `Const::Nil` (NIL_BITS).
  - `Prim::IsEmptyList` compares against the SAME constant (NIL_BITS).
  - This makes EL.1 zero-behavior-change.

### REMOVES

  - The `if elems.is_empty() { continue }` branch in
    `pattern_matrix::specialize_listcons` (the bug surface).
  - The "[| tail] form — degenerate" comment.
  - The implicit "Pattern::Nil and Pattern::List(vec![], None) are
    interchangeable" assumption in pattern consumers — they're now
    structurally split (even if runtime hasn't split yet).

## Expected effect

  - 4 spurious pattern_check warnings in `list_primitives` (and the
    same for any future `nil | cons` fn) disappear.
  - Spec dumps (`expected.specs`) show `IsEmptyList` instead of
    `ListIsNil`. Re-bless.
  - CLIF goldens may show prim-name annotations differ. Re-bless.
  - `expected.txt` unchanged everywhere.
  - All 842 tests pass.

## Independent of

EL.2-EL.4. Strictly precedes them.

## Walkthrough hazards

  - Rename touches every caller of `Prim::ListIsNil`: ir_lower,
    ir_codegen, ir_interp, fold_prim, reducer, tests. CI lint pass
    catches misses (clippy + cargo check).
  - Pattern_matrix.rs's specialize_listcons gets a new SwitchKey
    variant. Any code that exhaustively matches on SwitchKey
    (`Nil | Cons` arms) needs an `EmptyList` arm. Grep before commit.
  - fold_prim / reducer pattern matching: `match_pattern` on
    Pattern::Nil vs Pattern::List(vec![], None) — today they're handled
    identically (both check is_nil). After EL.1: split prims but same
    runtime check. After EL.2: different prims AND different runtime
    checks.
title: fz-EL.1: IR scaffold — Const::EmptyList, Prim::IsEmptyList, SwitchKey::EmptyList
